description: Callback and command-channel style behaviour (HTTP/DNS per CALDERA profile) to validate detection of agent/backdoor-like traffic.
expected_telemetry: DNS tunneling or long TXT records (profile-dependent)
Process and network connection telemetry (EDR / host logs)
safety_notes: Confirm firewall policy before any callback leaves the lab NAT. Do not use real external C2 infrastructure.
cleanup_notes: On guests, check Sandcat processes, scheduled tasks, and persistence; revert VMs with snapshots if needed.
